column3: a dressmaker's mannequin wearing a suit jacket that fits it with uncanny
column4: obsessive perfection — every seam traces the exact contours of that specific dummy
column5: every stitch follows its unique asymmetries. On the right
column6: a real human man attempts to put on an identical jacket cut from the same pattern — but it is clearly unwearable on a real body: the shoulders pull grotesquely
column7: the chest strains at the buttons
column8: the sleeves are the wrong length
column9: the whole garment distorts. His expression shows confusion and discomfort. Warm atelier lighting
